scope: GSC-only analysis of tracked keywords for www.bariatriccounselingcenter.com (48 snapshots, 2026-05-07 to 2026-07-06). Competitor #1-blocker and AI-visibility sections remain manual and are not covered here.
wins: Core local terms hold the #2-#3 tier: 'bariatric counseling san antonio' at 2.0, 'weight loss counseling san antonio' at 2.0 (up from 25.3 at the May 7 reference), and 'bariatric therapist' at 3.0.
'emotional eating therapy san antonio' climbed to position 4.0 (from 23.0 at the old reference) and 'bariatric counseling near me' sits at 6.6 with a +1.4 delta.
'bariatric counseling' (30 impressions, the highest-impression commercial term with data) improved +4.2 to position 11.7, knocking on page 1.

The hydration blog post is the site's strongest page: 8 clicks on 1,547 impressions at position 5.0; the sleep-and-weight-loss post adds 1,161 impressions, and the GLP-1 medications page pulls 634 impressions at 9.6.
needs_attention: Keyword coverage: 25 of 75 tracked KEYWORDS show GSC impressions; 50 show none. This is a keyword count, not a page count - the 75 keywords map to 48 distinct target pages, and most previously staging-targeted tracker URLs were stale pointers to pages already live (tracker hygiene, not lost traffic). Only 2 distinct staging-targeted URLs remain in the tracker.

Visibility drift: impressions fell from 2,447 (2026-05-07) to 1,616 (2026-07-06) and impression-weighted avg position worsened from 14.87 to 25.64 over the 48-snapshot window. Single-day snapshots swing day to day; treat as directional only.
CTR is near zero: 3 clicks on 1,616 impressions (~0.19%) in the latest snapshot; blog posts absorb most impressions while service pages capture little of it.

Slipped terms: 'food addiction treatment' delta -37.6 to position 68.6 (5 impressions), 'san antonio bariatric center' delta -21.3 to 34.5 (10 impressions), 'bmi center san antonio' delta -9.7 to 20.8 (6 impressions). These are low-impression positions and directional only.
'nutrition counseling' has the most impressions of any tracked term (66) but ranks 71.9 - visibility with no realistic click potential at that depth.
priority_actions: Keyword-tracker hygiene: repoint the 2 remaining staging targetUrls (and fill in the 2 keywords with no targetUrl) in keywords-master.json to the correct live www URLs so GSC page-matching works for those terms.
If a staging-to-prod publish backlog matters this cycle, confirm the real push list via a staging-vs-prod sitemap diff or Daniel's notes rather than inferring it from keyword data.

Fix CTR leakage: add prominent CTAs and internal links from the high-impression blog posts (hydration 1,547 impr, sleep 1,161 impr, GLP-1 medications 634 impr) into the matching service pages, and refresh titles/meta descriptions on those posts.
On-page refresh for the slipped terms: 'food addiction treatment' (-37.6) and 'san antonio bariatric center' (-21.3) need content and internal-link attention; food addiction is a strategic BCC lane.

Defend the #2-#4 local cluster ('bariatric counseling san antonio', 'weight loss counseling san antonio', 'bariatric therapist', 'emotional eating therapy san antonio') and confirm FAQ schema on those pages for rich-result and AI-overview eligibility.
summary: 25 of 75 tracked keywords (a keyword count, not pages) show GSC data; the core San Antonio local cluster holds #2-#4 while overall impressions drifted down (2,447 to 1,616) and CTR stays near zero at ~0.19%. Top priority: route the blog posts' page-1 impressions into service pages with CTAs and internal links, and finish tracker hygiene on the last stale targetUrls.
